title: select count(*) works very slow for uncommitted data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE user_card_info_hash_4 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) CHECK (amount >= 0));
INSERT INTO user_card_info_hash_4 (name, amount) SELECT CONCAT('User', id), ROUND(RANDOM() * 1000, 2) FROM generate_series(1, 10000000) AS id;
key_bug_features: select count(*) on uncommitted data causes excessive IO usage
